title: Butter Tasting
description:
Join us on Wednesday, March 25th from 4–7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for a fun and easygoing tasting featuring the crowd-pleasing wines of JaM Cellars Butter. From bold reds to bright whites, this lineup highlights rich California flavors and approachable styles made for everyday enjoyment.

Tasting Fee: $10 (Buy a bottle from the tasting and your fee is refunded)

Featured Wines:

  • JaM Cellars Butter Cabernet Sauvignon – Smooth and juicy with dark red fruit, soft oak, and a touch of vanilla on the lingering finish.
  • JaM Cellars Butter Pinot Noir – Bright and silky with ripe strawberry, Bing cherry, and subtle vanilla spice.
  • JaM Cellars Butter Chardonnay – Rich and creamy with stone fruit, baked lemon, and a long, luscious vanilla finish.
  • JaM Cellars Butter Sauvignon Blanc – Refreshing and tropical with key lime, pineapple, papaya, and a crisp, clean finish.

Discover why Butter wines are such a fan favorite—buy a bottle and your tasting is free.
